title: Herbstlande
description: This is the Modpack for a german build-team called "Herbstlande", building a medieval fantasy map.
body:
# What is "Herbstlande"
"Herbstlande" is a German Minecraft server that creates a semi-realistic medieval world.
The term medieval is stretched somewhat here and includes buildings from ancient times as well as - from the perspective of the Middle Ages - more recent eras.

“Herbstlande” is German and translated means autumn lands. The name is quite old and has nothing to do with the world we are currently working on. The name has remained with us to this day out of tradition.

This modpack is designed for players joining **Herbstlande** as well as **[ArdaCraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ardacraft)**.
Since ArdaCraft updates mods independently, we cannot always guarantee compatibility between the servers. However, our goal is to make it easy to jump between the two servers.
The modpack contains a different overlay than the ArdaCraft Modpack. We adapted tha AC-Overlay for us, same with the shader. There are a few blocks there - mostly glass panes - that we changed/deledet. We also use Xaeros Worldmap instead of Journeymap.

The two main content mods are [Conquest Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/conquest-reforged) and [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric), alongside a suite of visual and performance-optimisation mods aimed to make players' experience as smooth as possible.
**ArdaCraft** also have a plot world where anyone can join and try their hand at building using the Conquest Reforged mod. You can also add your friends to your plot to build together!

We would be happy if you join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/bKPWNjyWG4). Here you will find regular updates and the opportunity to easily get in touch with us. If you are interested in applying for our team, please contact us there too.
Our team leader Aventus presents some of our buildings on his [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCm41aSd-bYVmG9ykUGms7Bw) channel, feel free to stop by!

# Permissions and Credits

First of all, we would like to say a big "thank you!" to the Ardacraft team, especially Fornad, for allowing us to use the Ardacraft modpack as the basis for our modpack!
A corresponding proof can be found [here.](https://imgur.com/tGsk8Fe)

## Resource Packs

The **ArdaCraft Overlay** is made by the ArdaCraft team. The version in the Modpack is edited by us.

The textures from the [ConquestReforged mod](https://conquestreforged.com/mod) and the CR-Create overlay are Made by Monsterfish. He allowed us to use it in our Modpack. See [here](https://imgur.com/tTKjD5s). The CR-Create overlay is made by TheUnknownDad. He also gave us his [permission](https://imgur.com/hA6mWpT).

**YAWP** is made by [Zordak](https://www.curseforge.com/members/z0rdak/followers). See proof of permission [here](https://imgur.com/jM3kSkz).

## Shader Packs
**Chocapic13_V9_Ultra_-_For_ArdaCraft** is a edit from ArdaCraft of [Chocapic13' Shaders](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/chocapic13-shaders) which changes saturation and shading, as well as providing full compatibility with Conquest Reforged blocks. The dev is no longer active, but a copy of his licencing rules can be found [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/bliss-shader) (scroll down to 'License'). Both [YoFPS](https://modrinth.com/shader/yofps) and [RedHat](https://modrinth.com/shader/redhat-shaders) on Modrinth refer to this licence. These rules are followed.

**Bliss-Shader-ArdaCraft Edit-Screenshots only** is an edit from ArdaCraft of the Bliss shader which changes saturation and shading, as well as providing full compatibility with Conquest Reforged blocks. The developer X0nk has given ArdaCraft and general permission to redistribute this. Look at the Description for the [ArdaCraft Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ardacraft).

## Mods

**Effective** is made by doctor4t. It is included as an override as the [Fabric Version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective/files/3989651) is not available on Modrinth.
